description_long: This bar features a rustic, medieval-inspired design with dark stone walls and heavy wooden beams forming an L-shaped structure. The interior showcases a long wooden bar counter with several high-backed stools, and a bartender stands behind the counter surrounded by shelves stocked with bottles and mugs. Ornate wooden columns and decorative elements, such as a hanging lantern and a wall-mounted sign, add to the old-world charm. The floor is made of wooden planks, and the back wall displays a rack of bottles, enhancing the authentic tavern atmosphere. A small awning and a sign with a mug motif hang from the exterior, suggesting a welcoming entrance. The overall ambiance is cozy and inviting, suitable for a traditional urban tavern or fantasy-themed setting.
description: A rustic, medieval-style bar with stone walls, wooden beams, a long counter, stools, and decorative tavern elements.
description_view_0: The view shows the exterior stone wall with a hanging sign and part of the wooden roof structure, but no entrance or interior details are visible.
description_view_1: This side reveals a window with a wooden awning and more of the stone wall, providing a glimpse of the bar's decorative exterior.
description_view_2: The main interior is visible, featuring the bar counter, stools, bartender, shelves with bottles, and ornate wooden columns.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the bar counter, stools, bartender, and a large bottle rack on the back wall, with more of the wooden floor and structure visible.
attribute_signage: A hanging wooden sign with a mug motif, mounted on a metal bracket near the entrance; no lighting or text is visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: One rectangular window with a wooden awning, centered on the side wall.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic medieval tavern with heavy wood and stone construction, ornate wooden details, and traditional pub influences.
